source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open TableFind, the restaurant reservation app at http://localhost:3008 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Book a table at Cooper's Seafood House for a party of 2 on July 15, 2026 at 7:00 PM, and add the special request 'Anniversary dinner'. Confirm the reservation.
